title: pelargonium × eriophyllum
intro: Pelargonium × eriophyllum, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve digestion, and alleviate menstrual cramps, among others. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, oil, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
